title: Create a list of ord values of a string

content.problemStatement:
You are given a string SSS.

You need to generate and output a **only** the values from list AAA


For each character of string SSS - append its ordordord value or ASCIIASCIIASCII value to the list AAA
S can contain any alphanumeric character [0 - 9], [a - z] and [A to Z]

Input Format

The first line will contain ttt - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow
Each line of the test case consists of a single line of input - the string SSS


Output Format

Output the list AAA

code.C++:
# Solution as follows

t = int(input())
for i in range(t):
    S = input()
    A = []
    
    for i in S:
        #Converts a character into its ASCII value
        A.append(ord(i))    
    
    print(*A)
